Container.Name: gridmind-frontend
Container.Overview: GridMind Frontend — React/TypeScript dashboard for the GridMind solar battery optimiser. Served via nginx on port 3009. Proxies API and WebSocket traffic to the gridmind-backend container at 192.168.1.75:8009.
Container.Requires: gridmind-backend must be running at 192.168.1.75:8009 on br0. Copy unraid/nginx.conf from the repo to /mnt/user/appdata/gridmind/nginx.conf before starting this container.

Config.Name: nginx config
Config.Description: Path to the custom nginx.conf from the GridMind repo (unraid/nginx.conf). Copy it to your appdata folder first.
